patch.value: Expose project profile application through MCP contracts and drift gates
When project profile commands land, expose the profile surface through MCP/contracts with schema snapshots and drift protection.

Profile application is exposed via pm_schema or a narrow profile MCP tool; tool schemas and command contracts include the new surface; contract snapshots, handshake tests, and negative tests are updated; pm contracts --command schema --schema-only --json remains green.

value.author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625
value.text: Duplicate check: status-all MCP profile searches found closed schema/config MCP tooling but no profile application surface because profile commands do not exist yet.
